content:
- Re-ran the full required final lanes on the final tree after the last composite-PK helper-plan contract was added: `make check`, `make lint`, `make test`, and `make test-long` all passed.
- Updated the task markdown to `<passes>true</passes>`, checked off the execution-plan checklist, and ran `.ralph/task_switch.sh`, which updated the Ralph task bookkeeping and history.
- Next after quitting immediately: `git add -A`, commit all tracked/untracked files with the required `task finished 02-task-generate-helper-shadow-ddl-and-dependency-order: ...` message including lane evidence, `git push`, then stop.
